# Hybrid Resource Plan

## Purpose
Plan resource allocations across phase-based work and sprint-based delivery streams, with clear
coordination between traditional governance and agile execution.

## Audience
Project Manager, Resource Manager, Delivery Leads, PMO.

## Inputs
- Milestone plan (`docs/templates/schedule/milestone-plan-hybrid.xlsx`).
- Sprint/iteration plans (`docs/templates/product/iteration-plan-template-agile.md`).
- Shared resource plan (`docs/templates/resources/resource-management-plan-template-cross.md`).

## 1. Phase-based resource allocation
| Phase | Key roles | Allocation % | Peak demand | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |  |

## 2. Sprint-based resource allocation
| Sprint/Iteration | Key roles | Capacity (pts/days) | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

## 3. Cross-methodology coordination
### 3.1 Integration points
| Integration point | Traditional element | Agile element | Hybrid approach |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Planning | Milestone plan | Release plan | Multi-horizon planning |
| Requirements | Baseline requirements | Backlog items | Progressive elaboration |
| Testing | Phase gates | Continuous testing | Risk-based verification |

### 3.2 Dependency management
1. Identify dependencies across phase and sprint workstreams.
2. Classify dependencies (technical, process, organizational).
3. Visualize dependencies and owners.
4. Track status in a shared register.

## 4. Shared services & cross-functional support
Identify shared resources (QA, Security, DevOps) and their engagement windows.

| Shared service | Owner | Engagement window | Expectations |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

## 5. Resource risks & mitigations
| Risk | Impact | Mitigation | Owner |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

## 6. Metrics & monitoring
- Capacity vs. demand trend by phase and sprint.
- Utilization targets by role.
- Skill coverage and gaps (use shared skills matrix template).

## Completion checklist
- [ ] Phase and sprint allocations reviewed.
- [ ] Shared services commitments documented.
- [ ] Resource risks captured.
- [ ] Coordination points agreed.

## Acceptance criteria
- Resource plan balances phase gates with sprint delivery needs.
- Capacity commitments are approved by delivery leads.
- Dependency tracking cadence is established.
